notes: Fully filled example. Bridge maps Korean name 'SK스퀘어' → KRX:402340 via ticker_map. Values are illustrative; replace with actual values from PDF body.
Filename-only example: ticker pre-mapped to KRX, but broker / targets / horizon left blank → bridge will record missing_fields=['broker','old_target','new_target','horizon'].
ticker_map miss example: '대한조선' is intentionally absent from ticker_map.example.csv → bridge marks 'ticker_unmapped' in missing_fields. flat direction (old==new) is also exercised.
